title: PodGroup Lifecycle — What's next
text:
Learn about the
PodGroup API
overview and structure.
Learn about the
Workload API
that provides
PodGroupTemplates
.
See how Pods reference their PodGroup via the
scheduling group
field.
Understand the
gang scheduling
algorithm.
Read
PodGroup scheduling policies
for details on
basic
and
gang
.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
